title.en: Ye Tian's original Zhou Tian's body was finally...

content.en:
Now.

Ye Tian's body was transforming at an incredible speed, and his strength continued to skyrocket.

Since he had broken through in the dojo of the Primordial Black Sea, the countless energies of the Primordial Black Sea around him had all poured into his body, helping him complete the final transformation of the Primordial Body.

The years passed, and in the blink of an eye, it was an era of the original realm, and time had passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's original Zhou Tian's body was finally completely condensed.

"This is the body of the original Zhou Tian, it's too powerful!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

His current Primordial Ancestor Body far surpassed those Holy Sons, and he was afraid that he could pinch those Holy Sons to death with one hand, and he didn't even need to use the Primordial Control Technique.

"Let's see if the golden light of the Holy Technique Dust can break my primordial Zhou Tian's body!"

Ye Tian let another copy body make a move, and directly cast the golden light from the dust.

Rumble!

The golden light of the dust hit the body of the primordial Zhou Tian, and he did not cast the glazed holy cover.

However.

Except for the golden light from the dust, which only made his body hurt a little, he didn't even break the defense.

"It seems that ordinary holy arts will be completely meaningless to me in the future!" Ye Tian smiled.

His current strength has grown to the point where even those fourfold ancestors can't understand it.

Moreover, he can go to the deepest part of the core area of the Cloudless Edge, there are good things there, if he doesn't go now, after he breaks through to the Quadruple Ancestor, he will not be able to enter the Cloudless Edge.

As he spoke, Ye Tian first turned all of his copy bodies into a state of condensing the original Zhou Tian's body, and then let a copy body go to the cloudless end.

......

Cloudless.

Ye Tian came here, and then entered the core area.

Soon, a group of black cloud beasts tried to intercept Ye Tian, but they were directly pinched and exploded by Ye Tian with one hand.

At this time, he didn't even need the glass holy cover, and he could directly enter with his physical body to resist the suppression here.

After a while, Ye Tian entered the most core area.

Rumble!!!!

A group of Quadruple Ancestor-level Black Cloud Beasts appeared and tried to besiege Ye Tian.

However.

"Taichu Fist!"

Ye Tian used the top-notch primordial mastery technique created by one hundred and eight extreme extremes, the Taichu Fist, to instantly kill a Quadruple Primordial Ancestor-level Black Cloud Beast.

The power of this punch has surpassed the golden light of the dust.

Thundered!!!

One by one, the Black Cloud Beasts of the Quadruple Ancestor level were bombarded and killed by Ye Tian.

In a short time, all of these Black Cloud Beasts were destroyed.

"I'm too powerful now, these Black Cloud Beasts can't threaten me at all!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he came to the bones of the fallen Black Cloud Behemoth.

This black cloud giant beast doesn't know how many years it has fallen, I'm afraid it will be extremely long, but the aura it exudes still makes Ye Tian feel frightened now.

Fortunately, it fell, otherwise just a wisp of breath would have killed Ye Tian.

As Ye Tian got closer and closer to the bones of this black cloud giant beast, the suppression became greater and greater.

Still, he ended up here.

"This corpse alone is a priceless treasure, but unfortunately I can't take it!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Although he couldn't take away this black cloud beast, the resources here could be taken by him.

The many resources bred here are enough to make the Quadruple Ancestors crazy, and the value is too high.

So, Ye Tian took away the resources one by one, and it took a long time to collect them all.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian tried to investigate the inside of the corpse of this black cloud giant beast, and found that the middle position of this black cloud giant beast was directly pierced by a force, and it could not be recovered.

A wisp of that power seemed to be able to kill him.

Of course, as long as you don't touch this breath, there is still no danger.

"It's a pity that I didn't leave any treasures, otherwise just give me a little treasure, and I will make a lot of money!"

Ye Tian said regretfully.

However, he did not leave immediately, but realized the breath.

The master of this breath can penetrate such a terrifying Black Cloud Beast with one blow, how terrifying its strength is, if he comprehends a little something, or imitates one ten-thousandth of the charm, he can create a very powerful primordial control technique.

So in the following years, Ye Tian wanted to create a primordial mastery technique involving three hundred and sixty-five extreme paths.

Because to become a Quadruple Ancestor, you need to take a primordial control technique as the core, break the shackles, and turn into a natal control technique.

The power of the Natal Mastery Technique is terrifying, and the power consumed is small, and the power will be increased.

He originally wanted to use the Primal Fist to break through to the Quadruple Ancestor, after all, the Primal Fist only involved one hundred and eight extreme paths, and he had fully comprehended three hundred and sixty-five extreme paths!

"Don't be in a hurry to break through first, wait until you comprehend the primordial control technique that contains three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths, and then go to attack the fourfold primordial ancestor!" Ye Tian decided.

For the years that followed, this copy of his body was here to comprehend the breath left over from the attack that killed the Black Cloud Behemoth.

The years are like traces, and in a flash, it is the era of 10,000 original domains.

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian created this primordial control technique.

In the cloudless realm, a fourfold ancestor-level black cloud beast had just been born, and Ye Tianyi pointed out.

Suddenly, a golden light came across time and space, directly piercing this Quadruple Ancestor Black Cloud Beast.

Then, the black cloud beast turned into powder and dissipated.

In fact, this black cloud beast couldn't test the power of this move, but Ye Tian felt that it was enough.

"This move contains three hundred and sixty-five kinds of extreme extreme paths, and it is mainly based on the endless extreme path, so it is called endless golden light!"

Ye Tian said.

Next, he will use the Infinite Golden Light to impact the Quadruple Primordial Ancestor, turning it into his Natal Primordial Mastery Technique.

......

The Toothless Gate.

Ye Tian's replica body is back.

Just when he was about to apply to attack the Quadruple Ancestor, the Fengming Ancestor of the Void Tooth Holy Gate issued an order not to let him attack the Quadruple Ancestor for the time being.

"I'm not allowed to attack the Quadruple Ancestor, no wonder the Void Tooth Holy Gate stipulated that any Holy Son who wants to impact the Quadruple Ancestor must apply for it. Ye Tian said darkly.

He felt that the Void Tooth Holy Gate was afraid that they needed these Holy Sons to do something, and only the Triple Ancestor could go.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian asked the Void Tooth Holy Gate's Fengming Ancestor, why was he not allowed to break through?

At this time, Feng Ming's original ancestor gave a time.

"No breakthrough is allowed in the 30,000 Origin Domain Era!"

She also only gave this sentence, as for more information, she didn't say anything.

"The 30,000 Primordial Era is not allowed to break through, so let's wait, and in the next few years, let's focus on creating the Primordial Control Technique!"

Ye Tian was going to create a few more mastery techniques containing three hundred and sixty-five extreme extremes to enhance his strength.
